name: Pipecat
description: Open-source Python framework for building voice and multimodal conversational agents, managed as cloud by Daily.co.

seo.title: Pipecat — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Pipecat: Open-source Python framework for building voice and multimodal conversational agents, managed as cloud by Daily.co.

when_to_use: Building real-time voice AI pipelines with STT/LLM/TTS chaining
Deploying conversational voice agents with sub-500ms turn latency
Integrating Daily.co or WebRTC transports into voice AI apps
Orchestrating multi-modal real-time AI with an open-source framework

pros: Open-source Python framework for voice agents
Modular pipeline with STT, LLM, TTS nodes
Managed cloud via Daily.co for production
review.verdict: Best-in-class OSS voice-agent framework if you are Python-comfortable and ready to tune latency yourself.
review.best_for: Python teams building custom voice agents with WebRTC
review.not_for: Node-first teams or anyone needing fully managed turnkey

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
